title: Alan Jamieson Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Alan Jamieson Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Alan Jamieson
Khoury Faculty
Portland Campus, The Roux Institute
Before coming to the Roux Institute, Alan Jamieson was a theater hand, a small business manager, and a jazz DJ. Now the Director of Computing Programs in Portland, he is passionate about helping Khoury College students discover new disciplines that match their own interests.
I really enjoyed building that experience for students to capture that lightbulb moment … That was the thing that I became passionate about, and it’s what I’ve made my career around
Alan Jamieson, Director of Computing Programs – Portland
Explore all Khoury Stories
